steps.title: Use weighted means
steps.content: For a frequency table, the mean is the weighted sum divided by the total frequency: $$\text{mean}=\frac{\sum(\text{value})(\text{frequency})}{\sum\text{frequency}}.$$ Since all four choices use the same values $68$, $78$, $88$, and $98$, compare their weighted means.

steps.title: Compare the four weighted means
steps.content: The correct answer gives $$\frac{68(5)+78(6)+88(7)+98(8)}{5+6+7+8}=\frac{2208}{26}\approx84.92.$$ The other choices each give $83$ because their frequencies are balanced around the midpoint between $78$ and $88$. The greatest mean is therefore A.
